name: paper-reading-toolkit
description: Codex toolkit for AGENTS.md-aware academic paper reading, Markdown formatting, and Obsidian Academic Research archiving.

interface.shortDescription: Read papers with local AGENTS.md rules and archive to Obsidian.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that bundles an AGENTS.md-aware paper-reading workflow: deep paper analysis, clearer Markdown output, and Obsidian Academic Research note routing.
defaultPrompt: Use deep-dive with my local AGENTS.md rules to read this paper.
Archive this paper discussion to Obsidian Academic Research.
Use beautify-output to polish this paper summary into clear Markdown.
